title: January 2022 financial-aid to-do — FAFSA, Trail Blazer, Al Forthan
html:
TL;DR

  • Three-line January 2022 reminder to do FAFSA, renew the Trail Blazer scholarship, and "send shit" for Al Forthan.
  • A second checkpoint on the Al Forthan scholarship admin thread — same scholarship Yahir is still working in 2022 05 06 to do osig flip phone (parallel jcef line).
  • Trail Blazer refers to Portland Trail Blazers Foundation scholarship — Yahir's freshman-year aid stack stretched across at least three named scholarships (al forthan, Trail Blazer, ford family foundation).
  • The "send shit" phrasing is a marker of Yahir's distaste for the scholarship-renewal admin loop — he treats it as friction.
  • Sits inside the scholarship admin grind that defines his 2021–2023 financial-aid posture (see 2022 05 02 dizzy financial aid for the embodied cost of this grind).

Why it matters

Three datapoints:

  1. The aid stack (FAFSA + Trail Blazer + Al Forthan + Ford Family + JCEF) is wider than any single note shows — this note adds Trail Blazer to the named-scholarship roster.
  2. The renewal cadence is annual and falls in the dead-of-January window, which is also a low energy month for Yahir per 2022 01 06 btc 21m zero sum.
  3. Connects to 2022 05 02 dizzy everytime i enter 2nd floor financial aid office — the osu financial-aid office is a physical anxiety trigger; this note is the administrative counterpart.

Open questions

  • Did he renew Trail Blazer? (No follow-up trace; would need to check 2023 notes.)
  • Total dollar value of his 2022 aid stack? (Unknown from vault; would be useful context for mom house by the river goal.)

Wikilinks
